series_metadata.series_title: Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) Recall Checks
series_metadata.series_description: In partnership with the CPSC, the Ohio Attorney General's Office (AGO) will run product recall checks to confirm Ohio businesses' compliance with the Consumer Product Safety Improvement Act of 2008. Records include, but are not limited to, information sent between the CPSC and the AGO regarding Recall Effectiveness Checks, correspondence, product recall reports, and payment requests and receipt records.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: from closure. ; Paper: from closure. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately
